title: Run engine: non-browser steps + template vars + run records + connector auth

implement.detail: lib/engine.mjs run loop (wait/local_command/api_call/connector/sub_automation; browser deferred to F via runBrowser); lib/template-vars.mjs ({{input/capture/event}}); lib/redact.mjs; store run records; server /run + /runs; backend src/app/api/connectors/[id]/auth-env (token-guarded, api_key scoped / oauth2 fresh token / 409 not-connected); src/lib/internal-token.ts (0600, symlink-reject, mode-repair, timing-safe verify)

test.detail: automations-engine (10: template vars, wait/api_call/connector/local_command-streaming/sub_automation, awaiting_connector, failure, browser-deferred, secret redaction); internal-token (2); live /run smoke ok; typecheck clean

codexReview.detail: R1 needs-attention 4 ALL AGREED+FIXED: (F1 critical) connector scriptPath override -> server-resolved only; (F2 high) run records persisted raw -> redactDeep of injected auth values on persist+emit; (F3 high) auth-env unauthenticated -> 0600 internal-token guard; (F4 med) auth:none over-delivers -> empty env. R2 confirmed 1/2/4 fixed, raised token-file-mode not enforced -> FIXED (lstat symlink-reject + 0600 repair) + test. No rebuttals.

codexPwTest.detail: engine covered by committed tests + live smoke; UI run viewer is E3
